errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: dlq-neo4j
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.uni: CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (u:University {id: event.after.id}) SET u.name = event.after.name, u.short_name = event.after.short_name, u.address = event.after.address, u.founded_year = event.after.founded_year', 'MATCH (u:University {id: event.before.id}) DETACH DELETE u', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.ins: CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (i:Institute {id: event.after.id}) SET i.name = event.after.name, i.short_name = event.after.short_name, i.dean = event.after.dean MERGE (u:University {id: event.after.university_id}) MERGE (i)-[:PART_OF]->(u)', 'MATCH (i:Institute {id: event.before.id}) DETACH DELETE i', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.dep: CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (d:Department {id: event.after.id}) SET d.name = event.after.name, d.short_name = event.after.short_name, d.head = event.after.head MERGE (i:Institute {id: event.after.institute_id}) MERGE (d)-[:PART_OF]->(i)', 'MATCH (d:Department {id: event.before.id}) DETACH DELETE d', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.spe: CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (sp:Speciality {id: event.after.id}) SET sp.name = event.after.name, sp.code = event.after.code, sp.degree_level = event.after.degree_level, sp.duration_years = event.after.duration_years', 'MATCH (sp:Speciality {id: event.before.id}) DETACH DELETE sp', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.dep: CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (sp:Speciality {id: event.after.speciality_id}) MERGE (d:Department {id: event.after.department_id}) MERGE (sp)-[:PART_OF]->(d)', 'MATCH (sp:Speciality {id: event.before.speciality_id}) MATCH (d:Department {id: event.before.department_id}) MATCH (sp)-[r:PART_OF]->(d) DELETE r', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.lec: CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (c:LectureCourse {id: event.after.id}) SET c.name = event.after.name, c.semester = event.after.semester, c.total_hours = event.after.total_hours, c.lecture_hours = event.after.lecture_hours, c.practice_hours = event.after.practice_hours, c.lab_hours = event.after.lab_hours, c.description = event.after.description MERGE (sp:Speciality {id: event.after.speciality_id}) MERGE (c)-[:FOR_SPECIALITY]->(sp)', 'MATCH (c:LectureCourse {id: event.before.id}) DETACH DELETE c', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value

CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (l:Lecture {id: event.after.id}) SET l.title = event.after.title, l.type = event.after.lecture_type, l.computer_type = event.after.computer_type, l.tags = event.after.tags MERGE (c:LectureCourse {id: event.after.course_id}) MERGE (l)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(c)', 'MATCH (l:Lecture {id: event.before.id}) DETACH DELETE l', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.stu: CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (g:StudentGroup {id: event.after.id}) SET g.name = event.after.name, g.enrollment_year = event.after.enrollment_year, g.curator = event.after.curator, g.speciality_id = event.after.speciality_id', 'MATCH (g:StudentGroup {id: event.before.id}) DETACH DELETE g', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value

CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (s:Student {id: event.after.id}) SET s.name = event.after.first_name + '' ''+ event.after.last_name + '' ''+ coalesce(event.after.patronymic, ''''), s.first_name = event.after.first_name, s.last_name = event.after.last_name, s.patronymic = event.after.patronymic, s.email = event.after.email, s.phone = event.after.phone, s.card_number = event.after.student_card_number, s.status = event.after.status, s.enrollment_date = event.after.enrollment_date MERGE (g:StudentGroup {id: event.after.group_id}) MERGE (s)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(g)', 'MATCH (s:Student {id: event.before.id}) DETACH DELETE s', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.sch: CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (sch:Schedule {id: event.after.id}) SET sch.date = event.after.scheduled_date, sch.start_time = event.after.start_time, sch.end_time = event.after.end_time, sch.classroom = event.after.classroom, sch.week_start_date = event.after.week_start_date, sch.teacher_name = event.after.teacher_name MERGE (l:Lecture {id: event.after.lecture_id}) MERGE (sch)-[:PART_OF]->(l) MERGE (g:StudentGroup {id: event.after.group_id}) MERGE (g)-[:CONTAINS]->(sch)', 'MATCH (sch:Schedule {id: event.before.id}) DETACH DELETE sch', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value
neo4j.topic.cypher.university.public.att: CALL apoc.do.when(event.after IS NOT NULL, 'MERGE (sch:Schedule {id: event.after.schedule_id}) MERGE (s:Student {id: event.after.student_id}) MERGE (s)-[:SHOULD_ATTEND]->(sch) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN event.after.is_present = true THEN [1] ELSE [] END | MERGE (s)-[:ATTENDED]->(sch))', 'MATCH (s:Student {id: event.before.student_id}) MATCH (sch:Schedule {id: event.before.schedule_id}) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[r1:SHOULD_ATTEND]->(sch) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[r2:ATTENDED]->(sch) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN r1 IS NOT NULL THEN [1] ELSE [] END | DELETE r1) FOREACH (_ IN CASE WHEN r2 IS NOT NULL THEN [1] ELSE [] END | DELETE r2)', {event: event}) YIELD value RETURN value
